message:
chore(bubbletea-macros): update UI test expected stderr line numbers

Mechanical update to all four .stderr expectation files for compile-fail
UI tests. Line numbers and column alignment shifted due to upstream
changes in imports and module structure of the test source files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a struct, found enum
 
        help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a struct instead.
- --> tests/ui/fail/enum_not_supported.rs:6:6
-  |
-6 | enum NotAStruct {
-  |      ^^^^^^^^^^
+  --> tests/ui/fail/enum_not_supported.rs:17:6
+   |
+17 | enum NotAStruct {
+   |      ^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a named struct with fields, found tuple struct
 
        help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a named struct with fields instead.
- --> tests/ui/fail/tuple_struct_not_supported.rs:6:8
-  |
-6 | struct TupleStruct(i32, String);
-  |        ^^^^^^^^^^^
+  --> tests/ui/fail/tuple_struct_not_supported.rs:17:8
+   |
+17 | struct TupleStruct(i32, String);
+   |        ^^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a struct, found union
 
        help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a struct instead.
- --> tests/ui/fail/union_not_supported.rs:6:7
-  |
-6 | union NotAStruct {
-  |       ^^^^^^^^^^
+  --> tests/ui/fail/union_not_supported.rs:17:7
+   |
+17 | union NotAStruct {
+   |       ^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a named struct with fields, found unit struct
 
        help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a named struct with fields instead.
- --> tests/ui/fail/unit_struct_not_supported.rs:6:8
-  |
-6 | struct UnitStruct;
-  |        ^^^^^^^^^^
+  --> tests/ui/fail/unit_struct_not_supported.rs:17:8
+   |
+17 | struct UnitStruct;
+   |        ^^^^^^^^^^
